step_rationale: Arachidonic acid substrate for COX-1/thromboxane and inflammatory eicosanoid production.
mechanism: C20:4 (arachidonic acid) is the precursor for thromboxane-A2 and inflammatory mediator synthesis amplifying thrombotic and inflammatory responses in MI.

references.title: Pilot study of myocardial ischemia-induced metabolomic changes in emergency department patients undergoing stress testing.
